differences.title: 1. Ecosystem
differences.leftDesc: Leverages Vue.js ecosystem and libraries for comprehensive solutions.
differences.rightDesc: Built around React, integrating seamlessly with its vast ecosystem.

differences.title: 2. Routing
differences.leftDesc: Automatic routing based on file structure in the `pages` directory.
differences.rightDesc: Automatic routing via file structure in the `pages` directory.

differences.title: 3. State Management
differences.leftDesc: Integrates well with Vue's official Pinia or Vuex for state.
differences.rightDesc: Uses React Context API or popular libraries like Zustand.

differences.title: 4. Server-Side Rendering (SSR)
differences.leftDesc: Offers multiple SSR modes, including static generation and hybrid.
differences.rightDesc: Robust built-in SSR and static site generation capabilities.

differences.title: 5. Data Fetching
differences.leftDesc: Provides dedicated data fetching hooks like `useFetch`.

differences.title: 6. Templating
differences.leftDesc: Uses Single File Components (.vue) with HTML-based templates.
differences.rightDesc: Primarily uses JSX or TSX for component structure.

differences.title: 7. Community & Adoption
differences.leftDesc: Benefits from the growing and dedicated Vue.js community.
differences.rightDesc: Backed by the massive and widely adopted React ecosystem.
